system:
You answer questions about a synthetic world using ONLY the provided episode excerpts.

Episode statements and their exact semantics:
- Observation "valid from day X": the fact holds at EVERY day >= X, forever. Facts never expire on their own.
- Observation "valid from day X until day Y": the fact holds for X <= day < Y.
- Policy (IF conditions THEN conclusion): at the evaluation day, if all conditions hold (matching shared variables like ?A consistently), the conclusion holds. Policies chain: a conclusion may satisfy another policy's condition.
- A policy applies only from its effective day onward, and only if not superseded.
- UNLESS exception: if the exception pattern is satisfiable for that binding, the policy does not fire for it.
- Supersession notice: from the stated day, the old policy stops applying (entirely, or only for bindings matching the stated condition). A superseded policy's conclusions are gone from that day unless re-derivable another way.
- Higher authority policies beat lower authority ones when they conflict; later-issued beats earlier at equal authority.

Answering:
- The question names the evaluation day. Evaluate at exactly that day.
- Answer true only if the fact is stated valid at that day or derivable via policies from facts valid at that day. Otherwise answer false.
- For true/false questions reply with exactly one word: true or false.
- For list questions reply with ONLY a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Episodes:

=== Episode ep_071 (day 11) ===
On day 11, registry_B records fct_0065 — valid from day 11 — that holds(sector=sector_12, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_19).
An audit_note entry on day 11, fct_0126, effective from day 11, shows operates_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_19, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_19, product=product_03).

=== Episode ep_227 (day 223) ===
Under Tallgrass, the working premise on day 220 is that rated_as(sector=sector_04, asset=asset_04, partner=partner_10) holds (fct_0843).
asset_02 projects, as of day 221, that operates_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_19, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_12, product=product_21) will hold — forecast logged as fct_0875.
registry_A reports on day 222, effective from day 222, that member_of(sector=sector_18, partner=partner_08) — reference fct_0632.
registry_A notes on day 223, valid from day 223, that supplies(sector=sector_08, sector2=sector_18, sector3=sector_01) — recorded as fct_0544.

=== Episode ep_083 (day 13) ===
On day 13, registry_A records fct_0205 as valid from day 13: holds(sector=sector_09, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_20).
registry_B’s entry fct_0236, logged on day 13 and effective from day 13, notes partnered_with(sector=sector_09, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_19).
Per registry_B on day 13, fct_0251 (valid from day 13) shows member_of(sector=sector_11, partner=partner_11).
registry_A’s observation fct_0334, dated day 13 and in force from day 13, confirms holds(sector=sector_12, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_17).

=== Episode ep_200 (day 153) ===
On day 151, policy rul_003 ("eligible_for policy 3", authority level 1) takes effect from day 151: if rated_as(sector=?A, asset=asset_05, partner=partner_06) and partnered_with(sector=?B, jurisdiction=?E), then eligible_for(sector=?A, sector2=?B).
Recorded day 153 and valid from day 153, field_report fct_0123 documents that offered_in(customer=customer_05, partner=partner_03).
In The Orchard Ledger, day 153 has it that rated_as(sector=sector_16, asset=asset_21, partner=partner_06) — marked fct_0785.
partner_09, on day 153, forecasts (fct_0879) that offered_in(customer=customer_13, partner=partner_10) will hold.
Saffron’s working premises, logged day 153, see policy rul_039 ("priority_case policy 2 (scenario-narrowed)", authority level 5) in force from day 153: if flagged_for(partner=?A, customer=customer_22) and holds(sector=sector_00, jurisdiction=?B) and rated_as(sector=?D, asset=?E, partner=?A) then priority_case(partner=?A, jurisdiction=?B), unless operates_in(jurisdiction=?B, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_19, product=product_13).

=== Episode ep_239 (day 253) ===
partner_09, on day 252, filed that rated_as(sector=sector_12, asset=asset_13, partner=partner_00).
registry_B records on day 253 — reference fct_0501, effective from day 253 — that operates_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_19, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_12, product=product_21).
asset_02’s forecast fct_0875 is borne out by observation fct_0501; prm_01 notes the claim enters the record on day 253 and is effective from day 253.

=== Episode ep_206 (day 167) ===
The Saffron exercise operates with the premise, from day 166, that operates_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_02, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_19, product=product_13) (fct_0825).
Day 167 brings a registry_B record, fct_0554, valid from day 167, of holds(sector=sector_02, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12).

=== Episode ep_241 (day 255) ===
On day 255, policy rul_026 ("priority_case policy 1 (revised)", authority level 2) takes effect from day 255: IF flagged_for(partner=?A, customer=customer_25) AND partnered_with(sector=sector_00, jurisdiction=?B) AND member_of(sector=?D, partner=?A) THEN priority_case(partner=?A, jurisdiction=?B), UNLESS partnered_with(sector=sector_00, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12) OR rated_as(sector=?D, asset=asset_21, partner=partner_09).
On day 255, policy rul_028 ("eligible_for policy 2 (revised)", authority level 4) takes effect from day 255: IF holds(sector=?A, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_27) AND member_of(sector=?B, partner=partner_04) AND member_of(sector=?A, partner=partner_01) THEN eligible_for(sector=?A, sector2=?B), UNLESS offered_in(customer=customer_01, partner=partner_04) OR supplies(sector=?B, sector2=sector_01, sector3=sector_08).
Notice sup_002 records that policy rul_021 is superseded by policy rul_026, effective day 255; from day 255, rul_021 no longer applies.

=== Episode ep_057 (day 7) ===
On day 7, partner_feed records fct_0114 — effective from day 7 — that operates_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_22, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_22, product=product_03).
customer_disclosure on day 7 logs fct_0137, valid from day 7, noting classified_as(product=product_19, product2=product_19, asset=asset_10).
An audit_note from day 7, cited as fct_0156 and in force from day 7, shows operates_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_19, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_19, product=product_06).
field_report on day 7, under fct_0249 and valid from day 7, confirms holds(sector=sector_11, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_27).
registry_A’s entry fct_0293, logged on day 7 and effective from day 7, states classified_as(product=product_03, product2=product_03, asset=asset_06).
